narrative:
Dudley Township has 535 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.1 percentage points.
